files.description: Service class wrapping Stripe SDK for payment intent creation and subscription management
ASP.NET controller handling Stripe webhook events with signature verification

setupInstructions:
1. Install Stripe.NET: dotnet add package Stripe.net
2. Add your Stripe API key to appsettings.json
3. Register PaymentService in DI container
4. Configure webhook endpoint in Stripe Dashboard
nextStepSuggestion: Generate unit tests for these integration components.
nextStepDescription: You now have a PaymentService and WebhookController. Generate unit tests to verify payment intent creation, webhook signature validation, and event handling.
